apiKey.name: x-dialect-client-key
apiKey.description: API key for the Markets API

bundleId.description: Identifier for positions bundled into one logical structure, such as position or market

ltv.description: Current Loan-to-Value of the position, expressed as a percentage ratio of deposited value

liquidationPrice.description: Deposited token price expressed in borrowed token units at which the position becomes liquidatable

bundleId.description: Identifier for positions bundled into one logical structure, such as position or market

baseDepositApy30d.description: 30-day average APY percentage ratio excluding rewards

baseDepositApy90d.description: 90-day average APY percentage ratio excluding rewards

baseDepositApy180d.description: 180-day average APY percentage ratio excluding rewards

baseBorrowApy30d.description: 30-day average APY percentage ratio excluding rewards

baseBorrowApy90d.description: 90-day average APY percentage ratio excluding rewards

baseBorrowApy180d.description: 180-day average APY percentage ratio excluding rewards

maxLtv.description: Maximum Loan-to-Value allowed when borrowing, expressed as a percentage ratio of deposited value

liquidationLtv.description: Loan-to-Value percentage ratio of deposited value at which the position becomes liquidatable

liquidationPenalty.description: Percentage ratio of deposited value taken as a penalty and given to liquidators when position is liquidated

maxLeverage.description: Maximum leverage allowed when depositing, expressed as a multiplier

maxLtv.description: Maximum Loan-to-Value before either full/partial liquidation commences (depending on the provider), expressed as a percentage ratio of deposited value

liquidationLtv.description: Loan-to-Value percentage ratio of deposited value at which the position becomes liquidatable, fully or partially.

get.description: Supported providers: MarginFi Lending, Kamino Lending, Kamino Multiply, Kamino Leverage, Lulo.

schema.description: Comma separated list of market types (`lending`, `yield`, `loop`, `perpetual`, `prediction`).
Comma separated list of provider IDs (`marginfi`, `kamino`, `lulo`, `jupiter`, `defituna`, `carrot`, `dflow`).
Filter by token mint address (comma-separated). Not supported for prediction markets. Requires an explicit type filter that excludes prediction (e.g. type=lending,yield,loop,perpetual).
Number of markets to return (default: 50, max: 200)

URL-encoded JSON object for filtering. For prediction markets: {"prediction":{"status":"open"|"closed"|"settled"}} or {"prediction":{"status":["open","closed"]}}. Accepts single status or array. Default status is "open" for prediction markets.

bundleId.description: Identifier for positions bundled into one logical structure, such as position or market

cursor.description: Cursor for the next page, null if no more results

get.summary: List all markets grouped by type
get.description: Supported providers: MarginFi Lending, Kamino Lending, Kamino Multiply, Kamino Leverage, Lulo. Temporarily without `prediction` type.
Fetch market snapshots within a time range for one or more markets. Optionally interpolate to a uniform time grid.

schema.description: Comma separated list of market IDs.
Start time of the snapshot. Date or datetime in RFC 3339 format
End time of the snapshot. Date or datetime in RFC 3339 format. Defaults to current time if not provided

get.summary: List all market positions by wallet address
get.description: Supported providers & markets: Kamino Lending, Lulo.

schema.description: Comma separated list of owner addresses. Currently only supports one address.
Comma separated list of bundle IDs. Currently only supports one bundle ID.

Comma separated list of position types (`lending`, `yield`, `loop`, `reward`, `prediction`). Currently only supports one position type. If no position type is specified, all position types are returned.

bundleId.description: Identifier for positions bundled into one logical structure, such as position or market

amount.description: Current networth of the position in borrowed token value

amountUsd.description: Current networth of the position in USD

ltv.description: Current Loan-to-Value before either full/partial liquidation commences (depending on the provider), expressed as a percentage ratio of deposited value

liquidationPrice.description: Deposited token price expressed in borrowed token units at which the position becomes liquidatable, fully or partially.

leverage.description: Current leverage of the position, expressed as a multiplier

bundleId.description: Identifier for positions bundled into one logical structure, such as position or market
Identifier for positions bundled into one logical structure, such as position or market

invested.description: Sum of all buy costs within the active position

investedLifetime.description: Sum of all buy costs across all re-entries for this market

netFlow.description: Net capital flow within the active position: sell proceeds minus buy costs. Negative means own capital is still locked in the position; positive means the initial investment has been fully recouped with additional realized returns

netFlowLifetime.description: Net capital flow across all re-entries for this market: sell proceeds minus buy costs. Negative means own capital is still locked in the position; positive means the initial investment has been fully recouped with additional realized returns

bundleId.description: Identifier for positions bundled into one logical structure, such as position or market

get.description: Fetch position snapshots within a time range for a wallet address. Optionally interpolate using Birdeye price data.

schema.description: Wallet address to fetch position history for
Start time of the snapshot. Date or datetime in RFC 3339 format
End time of the snapshot. Date or datetime in RFC 3339 format. Defaults to current time if not provided
Comma separated list of position IDs.

get.summary: Get PnL data for wallet positions
get.description: Computes realized and unrealized PnL for all pnl-able positions (currently DFlow prediction only), including closed positions.

schema.description: Comma separated list of owner addresses. Currently only supports one address.

total.description: Total PnL for all positions within the current session, unrealized + realized PnL

realized.description: Realized PnL for all positions within the current session

unrealized.description: Unrealized PnL for all positions. If position is closed, this field will be empty.

realizedLifetime.description: Realized PnL for all positions across all sessions

totalLifetime.description: Total PnL for all positions across all sessions, unrealized + realized lifetime PnL

total.description: Total PnL for the active position, unrealized + realized PnL

realized.description: Realized PnL for the active position

unrealized.description: Unrealized PnL for the active position. If position is closed, this field will be undefined.

realizedLifetime.description: Realized PnL for positions across all re-entries for this market

totalLifetime.description: Total PnL for positions across all re-entries for this market, unrealized + realized lifetime PnL

invested.description: Sum of all buy costs within the active position

investedLifetime.description: Sum of all buy costs across all re-entries for this market

netFlow.description: Net capital flow within the active position: sell proceeds minus buy costs. Negative means own capital is still locked in the position; positive means the initial investment has been fully recouped with additional realized returns

netFlowLifetime.description: Net capital flow across all re-entries for this market: sell proceeds minus buy costs. Negative means own capital is still locked in the position; positive means the initial investment has been fully recouped with additional realized returns

positions.description: List of positions that contribute to PnL calculations. Each position is a separate entry.
